title: 1,000+ Tokens/Sec: Google Just Shattered the AI Speed Limit (DiffusionGemma)
summary: Google DeepMind released DiffusionGemma, a text generation model that applies diffusion-based image generation techniques to language by using uniform state diffusion across bidirectional passes. The model achieves generation speeds exceeding 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs by shifting the architecture from memory-bound to compute-bound inference.
writeup: The video covers Google DeepMind's DiffusionGemma, a model that applies diffusion-based generation to text using uniform state diffusion to refine token outputs across multiple bidirectional passes rather than producing tokens strictly left to right. The central architectural shift moves local LLMs from memory-bound to compute-bound, which yields theoretical generation speeds exceeding 1,000 tokens per second on H100 GPUs. The key tradeoff is explicit: the approach sacrifices maximum output quality in exchange for the speed gains.
